mapper.sql: H.hs_code , H.hs_name , H.hs_tariff_rate , C.hs_class_level_cd , C.hs_class_nm , C.hs_class_desc , C.parent_hs_class_cd , C.selectable_yn , C.sort_sn , NVL(C.use_yn, 'Y') AS use_yn
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hs_code H LEFT JOIN hs_class C ON C.hs_class_cd = H.hs_code

SELECT
FROM hs_code H LEFT JOIN hs_class C ON C.hs_class_cd = H.hs_code WHERE H.hs_code = #{hsCode}
